Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I finished my story and wanted to show it to you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I was having a lot of trouble with the ending... but I finally figured it out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}After the alligator ate his friend, the bird, he cried and cried for a long time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}In fact, he was so sad... that he drowned in his own tears.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}His tears became a sparkling lake, around which grew beautiful flowers, and a tree that bore delicious fruit.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}The other animals in the forest came there often to relax...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}But none of them knew the alligator had created it, or that he was gone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}That's the ending I decided on.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Even though the alligator didn't find meaning in his life, the residents of the forest did.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}The meaning of my life isn't something I should spend my time on.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}It's more about how I was able to affect others.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}So... for me, or you, or anyone... just simply existing gives our lives meaning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}People can't survive without help from others... We all depend on one another.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I don't know how to explain it, but... does that make sense?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}...That's what I've found to be the meaning of life.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Perhaps you and others have different concepts of what it is...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}This is the notebook I wrote my story in. I've poured my heart and soul into it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I wanted to give you this... since you shared my final moments.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: Unused[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}It seems so insignificant, but maybe there was some meaning in it, for both of us...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Thank you... In the end... I'm glad that I was born...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can sense Kamiki's tender feelings...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship is stronger now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Sun Social Link reached its maximum level! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Asura{f 0 1 27}, the grand being![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...With the notebook tightly in hand,[n]I decided to head back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
